title: 500mm Gauge
description: Meter Gauge's rail style, but in a vanilla 500mm gauge
body:
![500mm Gauge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c192be1a4bec6c0bd8e57c493f9745ebc55833d.png)

This pack is for those who enjoy the stylistic choices of [Meter Gauge](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/meter-gauge), but would rather use the vanilla gauge of 500mm. This pack shares all the features of Meter Gauge (except for the gauge, obviously), and should have complete feature parity. I will update this pack in the future to make sure it always stays up to date with Meter Gauge and the latest version of Minecraft.

![Slopes & Curves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2a0bba4f647f44209308c79a10e76c2f79258d5.png)

Slopes with vanilla minecraft rails are unreasonably steep, so to compensate for this somewhat, slope sections are now rack sections, and the minecart models included have rack wheels on their axles. I unfortunately failed to come up with a way to make the curves more reasonable.

![! Known Issues !](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99527ace406c248b6d8f230d60db2c869f8cba77.png)

- The only type of minecart with animations working is the default one, as I have been unable to come up with a way to get the others working. I presume this is a bug with EMF.

![OptiFine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74a8c0ea9cf16d77b18d9e43506dcdb0107fa978.png)

Please note the minecart models included in this pack **require** either [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) to render properly. If you wish to use this pack in vanilla, it is entirely possible with no modifications to the pack, you just won't see the animated 3D wheels, axles, or rack wheel.
